problem id: 53329505
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01111101 -> 11111011
  01110010 -> 11100101
  01000111 -> 10001111
  00110100 -> 01101000
  00101100 -> 01011000
  11011000 -> 10110011
  00010000 -> 00100000
  00001111 -> 00011110
  00101111 -> 01011110

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11011111
